subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! He hath exalted His loved ones, granted them excellence, and shall assuredly bestow upon them sovereignty according to His Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد دوستانش را برتری داد بهتری داد مهتریهم خواهد داد اراده اش را
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection of Muhammad, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
